data.title: Breaking: Bitwise Solana Staking ETF (BSOL) Files 8-A to List on NYSE
data.description:
Bitwise Solana Staking ETF (BSOL) gears up for listing as the issuer submitted an amended 8-A filing with the U. S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). The final deadline for the US SEC to decide on Bitwise’s BSOL exchange-traded fund (ETF) was October 16, which got delayed due to the prolonged U
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/10/23/breaking-bitwise-solana-staking-etf-bsol-files-8-a-to-list-on-nyse/

data.description:

While the two aren’t direct competitors, as Base runs on Ethereum (ETH) while Bitcoin Hyper is being built on Bitcoin (BTC), they share a similar mission: […]

data.title: Dogecoin RSI Breakout Shows Main Target, Why $1 Is Still Possible
data.description:
Dogecoin is getting attention again after crypto analyst Shan Specter shared a new chart on X. In the post, Specter said Dogecoin is showing a green bullish dot on the daily chart, along with an RSI breakout. He described the move as “incredible” and said the coin looks ready to rise again. His chart shows that Dogecoin is now breaking past a level that had been holding it down for a while
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/dogecoin/dogecoin-rsi-breakout-1/

data.title: To hedge with gold, you’ll need more than nerves—you’ll need time
data.description:

It was a brutal reality check for investors hoping gold would instantly save them when markets went south. But the crash doesn’t cancel […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/to-hedge-with-gold-youll-need-time/
